description: Specs for the Statistics page — execution performance analytics and metrics dashboard

groups.name: Page Purpose
groups.description: The Statistics page provides performance analytics for workflow executions. It displays summary metrics (total runs, average duration, success rate, total time), a status breakdown with visual distribution bars, and a recent runs table comparing each run's duration against the average. A performance view adds time-range filtering and detailed metric cards.

assertions.description: Users can see key execution metrics including total runs, average duration, and success rate at a glance
Users can view the distribution of run statuses (completed, failed, running, stopped) with visual bar charts
Users can review recent runs with duration comparisons against the average to identify slow executions
